name: Wekapipo
description: Wekapipo is an exiled Neapolitan and a practitioner of the Spin. He wields a special type of steel ball called Wrecking Ball. After serving as a royal guard for the Kingdom of Naples, Wekapipo was forced into exile and later entered the service of the current President of the United States, Funny Valentine. name: Ebichu
description: A female hamster with a fondness for Camembert cheese and rum-raisin ice cream, Ebichu tries to do her best for her owner, but her efforts always backfire, causing her to get a beating. Price: 1050Yen (tax included).

description: A young girl who likes dressing in gothic lolita clothing and acting like a little girl to hide her twisted nature. Her family is known for being torturers, and she's a member of the Momobami clan.

description: A government operative and a nuclear scientist affiliated with NEST, an organization within the United States FBI. She travels to Japan to assist in investigations regarding the terrorist attack. (Source: Wikipedia)

description: Hitori's younger sister.

name: Golgo 13

name: Hakutou
description: He was an abandoned cat who was found and picked up by [Kentarou Momose](https://anilist.co/character/305654/) and [Yuusei Shirosaki](https://anilist.co/character/305653/). Shirosaki later adopted him. He was named by taking a kanji each from Shirosaki's (白) and Momose's (桃) names.

name: Haru
description: Doctor Kasukabe's wife, she was a magic user before turning into a devil.

name: Hideo Suzuki
description: Hideo is a down-on-his-luck mangaka who found work as an assistant after his own series was cancelled due to poor sales. He comes across as fairly timid and insecure, but often has spurs of confidence. He suffers from delusions and is very anxious, especially when in the dark. Despite Japan's strict laws on firearms, he owns a shotgun to which he has a license. name: Kirche Augusta Frederica von Anhalt-Zerbst
nativeName: キュルケ・アウグスタ・フレデリカ・フォン・アンハルツ・ツェルプストー
description: __Height:__ 171 cm (5'7") __Familiar:__ A salamander, Flame Louise's classmate. Fire magic is her speciality - drawn from her strong passion for money. The territory she is from has long since had a dislike for the La Valliere family. She flirts and has dated (and heavily implied in the anime, slept with) many of the academy boys, but falls in love with Saito. Kirche means "Church" in German, and the rest of her names might be named after Sophia Augusta Frederika of Anhalt-Zerbst.

name: Lemon Nishikawa
description: Lemon is Sunao Akiyoshi's childhood friend and ex-girlfriend. After bumping into [Sunao](https://anilist.co/character/317238) years later, she wakes up in his body the day after.

name: Liko Izayoi
description: Liko is thirteen years old and attends a school in the magic world. She is quite a shy girl with a lot of self-esteem. Even though she is great at studying her magic is quite weak. She puts a lot of pressure on herself because she wants to become a respectable witch like her sister. After meeting Mirai and becoming a Pretty Cure she starts to loosen up and becomes brighter and less worrisome. (Source: Pretty Cure Wikia)

name: Mjurran
